scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "cross-env PYTHONUTF8=1 PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python run.py" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 -t 120000 && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:api-only:noreload: cross-env PYTHONUTF8=1 PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 RELOAD=0 python run.py
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && cross-env RELOAD=0 python run.py
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
